parentQuestion: Epithelial tissues have all of the following general characteristics except they...

scaffolds.explain: The extracellular matrix is the material located outside cells, in the spaces between them. It provides structural support and biochemical signals in many tissues.

scaffolds.q: Which tissue type has cells that are separated by large amounts of extracellular matrix?
scaffolds.explain: Connective tissue is characterized by having lots of extracellular matrix with relatively few cells scattered throughout. This is the opposite of epithelial tissue, where cells are tightly packed.
